scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @idle-rpg/core && npm run dev -w @idle-rpg/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @idle-rpg/core && npm run build -w @idle-rpg/web && npm run build -w @idle-rpg/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @idle-rpg/core && npm run typecheck -w @idle-rpg/web && npm run typecheck -w @idle-rpg/server
